Zong Yan ŚģóŤĪĒ
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zong Yan (ŚģóŤĪĒ). Chancellor of Liang. He despised Liu Fang. Zong Yan was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
